title: TimedLife
description:
Survival getting boring? Try this time-based challenge!
Mine resources for time, die if you run out!
body:
## TimedLife Datapack The **TimedLife** datapack adds an exciting element to your Minecraft gameplay by introducing a time-based challenge. Each player begins with a limited amount of time, and as the clock ticks down, they must strategically gather rare blocks to extend their lifespans. Once a player's remaining time reaches zero, they face the ultimate consequence – death. ## How to Play 1. **Start**: Your time begins ticking down as soon as you move. 2. **Gain Time**: Place rare blocks, stand on them, and sneak to consume them, adding precious minutes to your remaining time. 3. **Survive**: Strategize and extend your lifespan by wisely using rare blocks. 4. **Consequence**: When your remaining time hits zero, you will face unavoidable death. ## Rare Block List - **Beacon** | 30 Minutes - **Block of Netherite** | 30 Minutes - **Block of Diamond** | 15 Minutes - **Block of Emerald** | 5 Minutes - **Block of Gold** | 3 Minutes - **Block of Iron** | 2 Minutes - **Block of Lapis Lazuli** | 1 Minute 30 Seconds - **Block of Coal** | 1 Minute - **Block of Redstone** | 1 Minute - **Block of Copper** | 45 Seconds - **Block of Quartz** | 30 Seconds ## Notes This datapack is inspired by a video I saw a few years ago, unfortunately I can't find it or I would credit it for the idea.
Supports Multiplayer *Your time is precious – use it wisely!*
